content.text:
Here are the 10 most interesting tweets from 2026-04-15 to 2026-04-16 matching your criteria (mentions of MIROSHARK/$MiroShark crypto token on Base chain, the GitHub repo https://github.com/aaronjmars/MiroShark or related dev context, and/or @miroshark_). I prioritized by engagement (likes/reposts/views), relevance (shilling the Base token, GitHub stars/dev nods, AI swarm intel descriptions matching the repo), and recency within the date range. All are from 2026-04-15 (no matching tweets on the 16th yet). Note: Some indirectly reference the GitHub via dev @aaronjmars, stars, or project descriptions; the $MiroShark token on Base is 0xd7bc6a05a56655fb2052f742b012d1dfd66e1ba3.

1. **@btcbabycow**  
   Full text: "他的这两个项目都要飞的节奏。 $aeon 0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3 $MiroShark 有创新，顶级， 在GitHub已經700星了。 0xd7bc6a05a56655fb2052f742b012d1dfd66e1ba3" (Translation snippet: "$MiroShark innovative top-tier, already 700 stars on GitHub" – pairs with dev's other project and Base token address).[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044447659386450343)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 16:08 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=14, Reposts=6, Replies=3  
   Link: https://x.com/btcbabycow/status/2044447659386450343

2. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars 40k -> 330k | 8x I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K. Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (Highlights Base chain, dev @aaronjmars, $MIROSHARK token growth).[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 16:24 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=7, Reposts=2, Replies=2  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044451737751433540

3. **@unborninfinite** (quoting @garrytan)  
   Full text: "the garry tan is not korean but very cool overall and is known to somehow set the trenches ablaze everytime. he just nodded @aaronjmars who has been consistently getting starred out on github with what he's building. He has $Miroshark at 250k." (GitHub stars nod to @aaronjmars/MiroShark repo, token MC).[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044459024138285163)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 16:53 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=4, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/unborninfinite/status/2044459024138285163

4. **@joraweb3** (reply to "What are you building today?")  
   Full text: "I'm cooking @miroshark_ fork 😂" (Directly forking the MiroShark repo/project).[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044503489926086909)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 19:49 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=1, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/joraweb3/status/2044503489926086909

5. **@geekyzaku** (reply to $Miroshark growth call)  
   Full text: "Agreed! @miroshark_ $Miroshark 50x!" (Strong shill for Base token growth).[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044209324801831356)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 00:20 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=1, Reposts=1, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/geekyzaku/status/2044209324801831356

6. **@krc20kult**  
   Full text: "Hey chad, take a look at @miroshark_ dev is #1 on base right now. You won't regret it $MIROSHARK" (Dev/token #1 on Base chain DEXs?).[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2044547119378305401)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 22:43 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Reposts=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/krc20kult/status/2044547119378305401

7. **@DaWachu80608** (reply to @garrytan)  
   Full text: "Chief @garrytan check his other project @miroshark_  is an open-source Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine that takes any document (news, policy, report, etc.) and simulates how society would react by running hundreds of AI agents debating across Twitter, Reddit, and a generated Polymark. Definitely  worth of checking $MiroShark" (Exact repo bio/desc match).[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2044445736859750540)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 16:00 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/DaWachu80608/status/2044445736859750540

8. **@V7eth**  
   Full text: "#miroshark 0xd7bc6a05a56655fb2052f742b012d1dfd66e1ba3 #anon 0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3 All one developer." (Base token address + dev link).[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2044553209612800383)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 23:07 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/V7eth/status/2044553209612800383

9. **@0xPierra** (quoting @aaronjmars launch post w/ GitHub context)  
   Full text: "$MiroShark 9drNxrSTDxHNXU2cWfudbVSMmTRSq6VNa5p24kEzTRND @miroshark_ 一款AI Agent模拟器：扔进文档（新闻/白皮书），自动生成知识图谱，召唤几百个性格各异的AI“网民”。 他们在模拟Twitter和Reddit上互喷、发帖，同时在Polymarket式预测市场下注。 舆论情绪实时影响价格，价格反过来改变舆论，形成闭环反馈。叙事战争预演器，懂的都懂" (Detailed AI swarm sim desc matching repo; note: this address appears Solana but context ties to project).[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2044302287926112688)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 06:30 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/0xPierra/status/2044302287926112688

10. **@0xPierra** (reply to @aaronjmars launch)  
    Full text: "Cool" (Direct nod to dev's MiroShark/@miroshark_ post).[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2044302320348082371)  
    Date: 2026-04-15 06:30 GMT
